end,function(Z,c)local A=h(c)local x=function(x,Q,b)return l(Z,{x;Q,b},c,A)end return x end,function(Z,c)local A=h(c)local x=function(x)return l(Z,{x},c,A)end return x end,function(Z,c)local end,function(Z)a[Z]=a[Z]-(-844332+844333)if-92828-(-92828)==a[Z]then a[Z],O[Z]=nil,nil end end,function(Z,c)local A=h(c)local x=function()return l(Z,{},c,A)end return x end return(o(258769+10486115,{}))(A(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(331198+-357838)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
